---
title: "Day 12: Puglia - Tour Day 2"
subtitle: "Tour Being Planned"
date: "2026-06-16"
day-of-week: "Monday"
location: "Puglia"
categories: [itinerary, puglia, placeholder]
status: "Placeholder - Tour Details TBD"
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Placeholder Page - Tour Being Finalized

This day is part of our 6-day Puglia organized tour (June 14-19). Specific itinerary will be updated once tour is confirmed.

**Expected Update:** Late March/early April 2026
:::

## Overview

**Day 2 of Puglia tour.** Details to be added when tour operator and schedule are finalized.

**See:** [Puglia Overview](../regions/puglia.qmd) for region information

---

## Expected Highlights

Based on typical Puglia tours, this day might include visits to:
- Historic towns (Alberobello, Lecce, Ostuni, Polignano a Mare)
- UNESCO World Heritage sites
- Baroque architecture
- Coastal scenery
- Wine/olive oil tastings
- Regional cuisine experiences

**This page will be updated with:**
- Specific itinerary for today
- Accommodation details
- Meal plans
- Activities and timing
- Free time opportunities

---

**Previous:** [Day 11](day-11-2026-06-15-puglia.qmd) | **Next:** [Day 13](day-13-2026-06-17-puglia.qmd)
